subject: M crashes before refinement
body:
Hello everyone:

I face a problem when performing refinement with M. Exactly, I succeed to 
creating a population, a species and a mask. Mask creation was done by the 
build-in function of M. 

Then I pressed the big "REFINE" button. The pop-up windows showed 
"Preparing refinement requisites".Unfortunately, after waiting for minutes, 
M crashed.

The parameters of M refinement are shown below.
[image: M_refine_1.png]
The pop-up error information and contents of "lastcrash.txt" are shown 
below.
[image: M_error.png]
[image: M_error_1.png]
Any suggestions?

Best wishes.
Hao
